summary: Iteration 41 - Tested 2 features: Q&A panel collapse bug fix (Specialists page) + Answer signature field (both Legal and Specialist Q&A). All 9 test cases passed across backend (8 pytest tests) and frontend (Playwright).

features_tested.spec_qa_panel_no_collapse_on_textarea_cl: PASS - Clicking inside the expanded answer textarea does NOT collapse the question panel
features_tested.spec_qa_panel_no_collapse_on_typing: PASS - Typing in the answer textarea does NOT collapse/close the expanded question panel
features_tested.spec_qa_panel_no_collapse_on_signature_c: PASS - Clicking in signature field does NOT collapse the panel
features_tested.spec_qa_panel_no_collapse_on_signature_t: PASS - Typing in signature field does NOT collapse the panel
features_tested.spec_qa_signature_field_visible: PASS - data-testid='spec-answer-signature-{id}' field is visible with placeholder 'Podpis (nepovinné), např. MUDr. Jana Nováková'
features_tested.spec_qa_answer_with_signature_saved: PASS - Answer with signature submitted successfully, 'Odpověď přidána!' toast shown
features_tested.spec_qa_signature_displayed_italic: PASS - Signature 'MUDr. Jan Novák, endokrinolog' displayed in italic (pink/muted) below answer content
features_tested.legal_qa_signature_field_visible: PASS - data-testid='answer-signature-{id}' field is visible with placeholder 'Podpis (nepovinné), např. JUDr. Jana Nováková'
features_tested.legal_qa_answer_with_signature_saved: PASS - Legal answer with signature submitted successfully, 'Odpověď přidána!' toast shown
features_tested.legal_qa_signature_displayed_italic: PASS - Signature 'JUDr. Marie Horáková, advokátka' displayed in italic below answer content
features_tested.backend_post_answer_with_signature: PASS - POST /api/questions/{id}/answers with signature field saves signature to DB correctly
features_tested.backend_get_questions_legal_with_signatu: PASS - GET /api/questions?section=legal returns answers with 'signature' field
features_tested.backend_get_questions_specialists_with_s: PASS - GET /api/questions?section=specialists returns answers with 'signature' field
features_tested.backend_answer_without_signature_default: PASS - Omitting signature field defaults to empty string in DB and response
features_tested.spec_qa_full_answer_submit_flow: PASS - Type answer + fill signature + click Send = answer saved and displayed with signature in italic

seed_data_creation: Created test answers in specialist question 'kde najdu nejlepsi FFS' and expanded legal question for testing signature display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug Fix #1 (panel collapse) and Feature #2 (answer signature) both verified working correctly. The collapse fix uses stopPropagation on expanded content div, textarea, and signature input - all three correctly prevent collapse. Signature field shows in italic using text-bloom-pride-pink/70 (specialists) and text-bloom-violet/70 (legal). Backend model AnswerCreate.signature defaults to empty string. Test credentials: test1@bloom.cz / test123 (admin). Previous iteration was 40 (100% pass). Login requires page.type() + Enter (not fill + click button).
